content:
🚀 Hiring: Application Operations Engineer (Linux | MySQL | Kubernetes)
📍 Location: Bangalore (Local to Bangalore- Immediate joiners preferred)
💼 Experience: 3–5 Years
🎓 Education: BE / B.Tech / M.Tech / MSc / MCA / BCA / BSc

⚠️ Note: Looking specifically for strong Application Operations profiles (Linux, MySQL, Kubernetes). Please refrain from sharing pure Java Developer profiles.

We are seeking a proactive Application Operations Engineer to manage, monitor, and optimize enterprise applications across environments. This role requires strong troubleshooting skills, operational excellence, and experience with modern infrastructure and containerized ecosystems.

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
• Administer, troubleshoot, and resolve configuration issues across applications
• Monitor application performance and support benchmarking activities
• Set up alerts, dashboards, and automated monitoring systems
• Analyze application logs/events to identify vulnerabilities and fix issues
• Perform periodic health checks and implement corrective actions
• Manage containerized environments and orchestration platforms (Kubernetes)
• Deploy applications across environments in coordination with release teams
• Automate operational activities and improve system efficiency
• Prepare operational and business reports
• Collaborate with development and support teams for continuous improvements
• Manage databases (RDBMS, NoSQL, Big Data systems)

🔹 Mandatory Skills:
• 3+ years of overall experience with 2+ years in application support/operations
• Strong experience in Linux, MySQL, and Kubernetes
• Experience supporting enterprise (client/server & web) applications
• Knowledge of J2EE applications and mobile applications
• Familiarity with Java, scripting, and databases (RDBMS & NoSQL)
• Experience with issue tracking tools
• Strong troubleshooting and analytical skills

📩 Interested candidates can share profiles at: harichandana.v@artech.com

#Hiring #ApplicationSupport #DevOps #Kubernetes #Linux #MySQL #CloudOps #ITJobs #BangaloreJobs #HyderabadJobs #NoidaJobs #PuneJobs #TechJobs #JobOpening #Automation #Monitoring
